steps.title: Spot the signal phrase
steps.content: The passage says the speaker indicates “beneficial opportunities have recently become available to women.” The key phrase is “recently become available”—we need a quote showing specific fields opening their access to women in a new way.

steps.title: Find the matching quote
steps.content: B states “Trade and science and craft and art, / Have opened their doors to the call of woman.” The phrase “opened their doors” directly illustrates opportunities becoming available, and names specific fields newly accessible to women. Choices A, C, and D instead describe ambition prompted by external pressure, assert inherent rights, or address an unrelated topic. That matches choice B — B is correct.
